mapper.insert: insert into feed ( username, feed_content, like_cnt, reply_cnt, created_at, edited_at, deleted ) values ( #{username}, #{feedContent}, #{likeCnt}, #{replyCnt}, NOW(), NOW(), #{deleted} )
mapper.select: select feed_id, username, feed_content, like_cnt, reply_cnt, created_at as createdAt from feed where deleted=0 order by created_at desc
select t.tag_name from feed_tag ft join tag t on ft.tag_id = t.tag_id where ft.feed_id = #{feedId} order by t.tag_id asc
select saved_name from feed_file where feed_id = #{feedId} order by file_id asc
SELECT count(*) FROM feed WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
